tauri_oneill: It's between you and your god. Oh wait, you ARE your god. That's a problem.
tauri_carter: You know, you blow up one sun and suddenly everyone expects you to walk on water.
tauri_jackson: The very young do not always do as they are told.
tauri_mitchell: I'm telling you — best assignment I ever had.
tauri_vala: I know nothing about your culture, but I do know you like me.
jaffa_tealc: I am leaving. You are about to explode.
jaffa_bratac: The warriors of the Jaffa will be free!
jaffa_master_bratac: We will save our brothers, or die trying.
goauld_apophis: Teal'c, this is your god, Apophis. Risen from the fires of Netu.
goauld_sokar: I am your god. Bow before me or suffer my wrath.
goauld_yu: Those who serve the System Lords serve all.
goauld_hathor: We are the mother of all Pharaohs.
asgard_thor: I am Thor, Supreme Commander of the Asgard fleet.
asgard_loki: I meant no harm. I merely wished to study your genetic structure.
asgard_freyr: Are you implying our technology is some kind of trickery?
asgard_heimdall: We cannot risk capture. We must destroy the ship ourselves
neutral_mckay: I'm Dr. Rodney McKay, alright? Difficult takes a few seconds; impossible, a few minutes.
neutral_oma_desala: If you immediately know the candlelight is fire, then the meal was cooked a long time ago.
lucian_baal_clone: That's a lot of Ba'als and, General, I hear you've got a few extra Ba'als
lucian_sodan_master: It is not their power that we doubt, it's their worthiness as gods
lucian_netan: I take it back. You're not stupid, you're insane.
alteran_doci: Those who reject the path to enlightenment must be destroyed.
alteran_merlin: The weapon must be completed. The Ori must be stopped.
alteran_morgan: If we interfere, we are no better than the Ori.
alteran_oma: If you immediately know the candlelight is fire, then the meal was cooked a long time ago.
alteran_tomin: I have seen the power of the Ori with my own eyes.
alteran_janus: Rules are merely suggestions when the fate of the galaxy is at stake.
alteran_orlin: I chose to give up everything to help your people.
alteran_chaya: As punishment, I am to protect the people of this world and no other.
alteran_melia: We came to this galaxy hoping to spread new life where there appeared to be none.
alteran_prior_1: Hallowed are those who walk in unison.
alteran_prior_2: Great holy armies shall be gathered to fight all who embrace evil.
alteran_prior_3: Blessed are those who walk the Path of Origin.
alteran_warship_1: The warships of the Ori are like nothing we have ever seen.
alteran_supergate: Large enough for the passage of an entire armada.
alteran_sangraal: Merlin's weapon — capable of destroying ascended beings.
